cases.name: Long sword + round shield
cases.notes: Workbook Weapon1 row 10 long sword values plus round shield DB/DM and Dex 11 match current derivation.

cases.name: Great sword two-handed
cases.notes: Workbook Weapon1 row 22 great sword values match current two-handed derivation with no shield contribution.

cases.name: Short bow missile
cases.notes: Workbook Weapon2 row 14 short bow keeps the dice DMB expression intact and matches current missile derivation.

cases.name: Composite bow formula DMB
cases.notes: Workbook Weapon2 row 15 matches current formula-preserving DMB handling for GMstr-based composite bow damage.

cases.name: Unarmed / brawling baseline
cases.notes: Workbook Weapon1 contains brawling rows, but the current app intentionally exposes an interim unarmed baseline; this matches current expected behavior.

cases.name: Ballista ammo-linked encumbrance
cases.notes: Workbook Weapon2 row 30 source encumbrance is 20+20, while current personal encumbrance totals still use the compatibility base 20 and preserve the ammo-linked detail only in notes.
